mapper.select: SELECT * FROM habit_checkins WHERE habit_id = #{habitId} ORDER BY checkin_date DESC
SELECT * FROM habit_checkins WHERE habit_id = #{habitId} AND checkin_date = #{checkinDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO habit_checkins (habit_id, user_id, checkin_date, created_at) VALUES (#{habitIdValue}, #{userId}, #{checkinDate}, #{createdAt})
